high.description: Clauses that pose significant legal or financial exposure requiring immediate legal review
indicators: Unlimited liability or liability exceeding 12 months of fees
Automatic renewal with periods longer than 12 months
Non-compete clauses exceeding 2 years in duration
Unilateral termination rights favoring only one party
Penalty clauses with fixed monetary amounts
Broad indemnification obligations without carve-outs
Waiver of jury trial rights
Exclusive IP ownership by the service provider for custom work
Non-refundable fees exceeding 10% of total contract value
Data breach liability exclusions for the responsible party
Early termination fees exceeding 50% of remaining contract value

medium.description: Clauses with unusual terms that warrant attention but are negotiable
indicators: Vague or ambiguous scope of work definitions
Payment terms shorter than 30 days
Broad IP assignment clauses covering feedback and suggestions
Annual fee escalation exceeding CPI by more than 3%
Confidentiality obligations exceeding 5 years
Limited warranty periods under 12 months
Three-party agreements with shared liability structures
Joint ownership of custom deliverables
Suspension rights for overdue payments with short notice periods
Acceptance periods shorter than 30 days

low.description: Standard contract terms consistent with industry norms
indicators: Mutual termination rights with reasonable notice (60-90 days)
Payment terms of 30 days or more
Standard confidentiality obligations (2-3 years post-termination)
Liability caps tied to 12 months of fees paid
Mutual indemnification with reasonable carve-outs
Clear scope of work with defined change order processes
Standard IP retention by each party for pre-existing IP
Binding arbitration in a neutral forum
Annual renewal with 90+ days notice for non-renewal
Transition assistance included upon termination

scoring_guidance.high_risk_threshold: Any single high-risk indicator triggers high-risk classification for that clause
scoring_guidance.overall_risk_calculation: Contract overall risk = highest individual clause risk level. If 3+ medium-risk clauses exist, elevate to high risk.
scoring_guidance.deadline_sensitivity: Flag any deadline shorter than 10 business days as potentially aggressive
